hooks.command: if ! command -v ast-grep >/dev/null; then echo 'tree-sitter: ast-grep not installed (pacman -S ast-grep / brew install ast-grep / cargo install ast-grep)'; elif [ ! -d "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/node_modules" ]; then cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server" && npm install --silent 2>&1 && echo 'tree-sitter: ready' || echo 'tree-sitter: npm install failed'; else echo 'tree-sitter: ready'; fi
